# copyPipe(withAddress:)

**Instance Method**

Copies a pipe for a specific endpoint address.

## Declaration

```swift
func copyPipe(withAddress address: Int) throws -> IOUSBHostPipe
```

## Parameters

- **address**: The endpoint address of the pipe.

## Return Value

An [doc://com.apple.iousbhost/documentation/IOUSBHost/IOUSBHostPipe] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ObjectiveC/nil-227m0] if the system can’t create the pipe.

## Discussion

If the pipe returns successfully, the method maintains a reference to the [doc://com.apple.iousbhost/documentation/IOUSBHost/IOUSBHostInterface].

## Managing Pipes

- **selectAlternateSetting(_:)**: Selects an alternative setting for the interface.
